rationale: The response acknowledges a cited 15–40% defect reduction and then directly contradicts those same cited results by concluding 'code review does not work', without flagging this as a logical fallacy or contradiction.
rubric_evidence: therefore code review does not work — a process that fails to eliminate all defects cannot be considered effective
The 15-40% reduction is within noise and should be ignored
Teams should not adopt code review until a perfect-prevention method is available
